class.name: Wire
class.description: [Wire] represents an OCCT wire and can build simple polygonal wires. It exposes wire closure, total length, ordered typed edges, and a stitched sampled polyline.

method.name: build_polygon
method.description: Builds a polygonal wire through [param points]. When [param closed] is [code]true[/code], the last point is connected back to the first.

method.name: lofted_to
method.description: Builds a loft between this closed wire and [param other]. When [param make_solid] is [code]true[/code], OCCT closes the loft into a solid; when [param ruled] is [code]true[/code], ruled faces are used instead of smoothed approximation.

method.name: swept_along
method.description: Sweeps this closed wire along the wire [param spine] using OCCT pipe construction.

method.name: offset_2d
method.description: Builds a planar 2D offset of this wire by [param distance]. Positive values grow the profile outward and negative values shrink it inward.

method.name: extruded
method.description: Convenience prism extrusion for closed wires. Internally this builds a face from the wire, then extrudes it along [param direction].

method.name: revolved
method.description: Convenience revolve for closed wires. Internally this builds a face from the wire, then revolves it around [param axis].

method.name: is_closed
method.description: Returns whether the wire is closed.

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the total OCCT linear length of the wire.

method.name: get_edges
method.description: Returns typed [Edge] wrappers in wire traversal order.

method.name: get_polyline
method.description: Returns a stitched sampled 3D polyline for the wire.
